title: Banter
description: Harmless, AI-driven ambient roleplay. When two or more player characters are near each other and banter mode is on, they occasionally trade a few short spoken quips as chat bubbles over their tokens (mirrored to the chat log). Banter is grounded in each character's biography and player-authored persona/relationship notes, the scene's tone, and combat state. The GM controls a quick on/off toggle, proximity radius, frequency, and a chaos level, and can view an estimated Azure OpenAI cost report. Generation runs through Connection Manager.
